title: lespedeza penduliflora var. albiflora
intro: Lespedeza penduliflora var. albiflora, also known as the white flowering bush clover, is a perennial flowering plant native to Asia and part of the Fabaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Lespedeza penduliflora var. albiflora include its ability to improve immune function, reduce stress and anxiety, and support cardiovascular health. Lespedeza penduliflora var. albiflora can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being used in tinctures and capsules, to harness its medicinal properties.
